channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Human Rights Tribunal Decisions Highlight Different Treatment of Trans and Cisgender Women
item.description: The B.C. Human Rights Tribunal recently faced scrutiny over its handling of complaints from a biological woman, referred to as J, and a trans-identifying inmate, Makayla Sandve. J, who had experienced...

item.title: May fuel price hikes to strain South African households
item.description: South African consumers are facing significant financial pressure this May as the Department of Mineral and Petroleum Resources (DMPR) announced notable increases in fuel prices. Petrol will rise by R...

item.title: KKR spinners set up victory as Raghuvanshi and Rahane guide chase in IPL 2026
item.description: In a commanding performance during the IPL 2026 match against Sunrisers Hyderabad, Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) secured a seven-wicket victory, largely thanks to their spinners Varun Chakaravarthy and ...

item.title: President Samia Wishes Success to Students and Teachers in Their Final Exams
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has extended her heartfelt wishes for success to Form Six students and teacher training college students who are currently sitting for their final exams. In her encouragi...

item.title: CEO Chooses Candidate for Character and Kindness Over Experience
item.description: A CEO has shared a powerful lesson in hiring, showing that character can outweigh experience. During an interview, a job applicant with almost no relevant experience impressed the CEO with her honesty...

item.title: Land Rover Discovery trapped by tide at Abersoch beach in North Wales
item.description: On Sunday morning, an £80,000 Land Rover Discovery became submerged by the rising tide at Main Beach in Abersoch, North Wales, a popular coastal area often referred to as 'Cheshire-on-Sea' due to its ...

item.title: Senator Cherargei Pushes for Reduction of Uhuru Kenyatta's Retirement Benefits Amid Political Activities
item.description: Nandi Senator Samson Cherargei has taken a bold step by filing a motion in the Senate to either halt or reduce the retirement benefits of former President Uhuru Kenyatta. In his motion, Cherargei accu...

item.title: Amazon’s New Logistics Service Pressures UPS and FedEx Shares
item.description: Amazon’s launch of Amazon Supply Chain Services weighed on shares of major shipping and logistics companies, including UPS and FedEx, as investors reacted to the prospect of stronger competition in fr...

item.title: DMW alerts public on illegal recruitment targeting OFWs in Middle East amid security risks
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) has issued a warning to the public regarding illegal recruiters, human traffickers, and syndicates offering job opportunities in the Middle East. These illegal ...

item.title: Excerpt from Paul Zacharia’s story depicting a nephew’s pursuit of his aunt’s clandestine lovers
item.description: This excerpt from Paul Zacharia’s ‘The Canto of Clandestine Lovers’ narrates the humorous yet intense story of a young man determined to expose his aunt’s secret lovers. Set in the ancestral Kallungal...

item.title: Reflections on Moving from Mumbai to Delhi: A Shift in Perspective
item.description: In this introspective article, the author reflects on his transition from Mumbai to Delhi, contrasting the two cities in terms of infrastructure, urban life, and cultural dynamics. While Mumbai has lo...

item.title: Could a Fight Between Kong and Godzilla Really Happen According to Physics?
item.description: In a playful analysis of the Godzilla vs. Kong debate, the article brings a scientific twist by using Galileo's law of the Square-Cube principle to demonstrate the physical limitations of these coloss...

item.title: The most fuel-efficient petrol, diesel and hybrid cars in the UK amid rising fuel costs
item.description: As fuel prices remain elevated due to ongoing geopolitical tensions in Iran, many UK drivers are exploring ways to reduce running costs without committing to electric vehicles. Domestic electricity co...

item.title: Congress Leaders KC Venugopal, VD Satheesan and Ramesh Chennithala Emerge as Top Contenders for Kerala Chief Minister Post After UDF Victory
item.description: In a significant political development, the Congress-led United Democratic Front (UDF) has returned to power in Kerala after a decade, marking a major shift in the state's politics. With this victory,...

item.title: WA introduces new rental laws banning no-fault evictions and setting minimum property standards
item.description: Western Australia has introduced significant changes to its rental laws aimed at improving tenant protections and living standards. The new legislation bans no-fault evictions, ensuring tenants cannot...

item.title: Babar Azam Leads PSL 11 Team of the Year After Stellar Season

item.title: Archbishop urges government to tackle insecurity and high fuel prices before 2027 elections
item.description: Archbishop JohnPrasie Daniel, founder of Dominion Chapel International Churches, don appeal to Federal Government make dem take urgent action against di rising insecurity and di wahala wey high fuel p...

item.title: Eta Aquariids Meteor Shower Visible in the UK Skies
item.description: The Eta Aquariids meteor shower, a spectacular celestial event caused by the debris from Halley's Comet, is set to be visible in the skies over Britain. Occurring every year in early May, this meteor ...

item.title: IHC upholds lease cancellation of One Constitution Avenue, denies ownership rights to apartment buyers
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has upheld the cancellation of the lease for the high-profile One Constitution Avenue project, ruling that apartment buyers do not hold ownership rights in the property....

item.title: Africa Forward Summit to Discuss African-Led Security Solutions and Financing Models
